expert_rss.title: War Department Signs $9.7B Technology Deal With Dell for Microsoft Services
expert_rss.summary: The War Department signed a $9.7 billion, five-year enterprisewide contract to purchase Microsoft Services, a move expected to save the department an initial $422 million annually.

expert_rss.title: Personal Property Activity Expands PCS Support Across Joint Force

wikipedia.notes: At 8:55 p.m. local time, a suicide bomber and multiple fighters detonated an explosives-laden vehicle near a security post, causing the post to collapse, destroying nearby vehicles and severely damaging nearby civilian areas.
Shortly after 8:00 a.m. PKT, an explosives-laden vehicle struck one of the carriages of a shuttle train near Chaman Phatak as the train was travelling through Quetta.

An individual with a known history of mental issues and support of Islamic State stabbed and injured three people at the Winterthur railway station while shouting Allahu Akbar. The Zurich canton police described the incident as an act of terrorism.
